title: wedelia cylindrocephala
intro: Wedelia cylindrocephala, also known as the Wedelia or Flor de Muerto, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, making it effective in treating a variety of health issues. The medicinal properties of Wedelia cylindrocephala are said to provide numerous health benefits, including relieving respiratory problems, reducing fever, and soothing digestive issues, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer and anti-viral effects. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
